rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO AMADO VAZ VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Requesting This Case Be Transferred Back To Its Original Dept 302
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF ANTONIO AMADO VAZ Motion Requesting This Case Be Transferred Back To Its Original Dept 302. GRANTED. No real property/housing causes of action alleged in the operative complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JINETTA SCOTT, AS TRUSTEE OF THE CLAUDE T. SMITH, VS. JOANN M. MAHER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Joann Maher'S Motion For Order To Transfer Action For Coordination Under Code Of Civil Procedure Sec 403
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 2. Defendant Joann Maher'S Motion For Order To Transfer Action For Coordination Under Code Of Civil Procedure Sec 403. GRANTED. Cases CGC-13-528581 (San Francisco), INC-1300844 (Riverside) and 26-61334 (Napa) are transferred for coordination to San Francisco County Superior Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH YODER et al VS. BRIAN VIGIL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT BRIAN VIGIL, KATHERINE SEARS Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Fees And Costs. DENIED. Plaintiff alleges a real property claim pursuant to SFRO 37.9(a)(8); injunctive relief is available for violation of this provision per SFRO 37.9(f). Defendants concede that Ms. Sears is no longer residing at the premises. Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that offering of the unit for rent to third parties is a required element of cause of action for wrongful eviction for violation of SFRO 37.9(a)(8).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FARHAD ZAGHI VS. CECELIA KENNEDY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF FARHAD ZAGHI Motion For Appointment Of Receiver. OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNABELLE D. ABRIGO VS. COUNTRYWIDE, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Countrywide Home Loans, Inc And Bank Of America'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 21, 2013, line 5. Defendants Countrywide Home Loans, Inc And Bank Of America'S Demurrer To Complaint. Sustained with leave to amend (1) as to first cause of action for wrongful foreclosure to allege facts showing that purported robo-signers did not have authority to sign in this case; to allege prejudice; and to allege tender of exception from tender; and (2) as to sixth cause of action for B&P 17200 violation to allege all elements of this cause of action. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to 2-5 causes of action, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
